pkgmetadata.longdescription: Fira Code is a free monospaced font containing programming ligatures for common multi-character combinations. This is just a font rendering feature: underlying code remains ASCII-compatible. Fira Code supports a wide variety of arrows, box-drawing glyphs, powerline symbols, and Unicode progress bar characters (U+EE00-U+EE0B). It also provides character variants (cv01-cv99) and stylistic sets (ss01-ss20) for customizing ligatures and glyph styles.
